designSystem.name: Event Site General Design System - Final
designSystem.description: Comprehensive design system extracted from creator-analytics dashboard implementation. Complete styling guide for all UI components, patterns, and design principles for building new features in this application.

designPrinciples.overview: The design system follows a modern, professional aesthetic with clear visual hierarchy, consistent spacing, intuitive user interactions, and semantic color usage throughout the application.
corePrinciples: Consistency: All UI components follow standardized patterns for spacing, colors, typography, and interactions
Accessibility: All interactive elements include proper ARIA labels, focus states, keyboard navigation support, and semantic HTML
Responsiveness: Mobile-first approach with breakpoints at sm (640px), md (768px), lg (1024px), xl (1280px)
Visual Feedback: Hover effects, transitions, and state changes provide clear user feedback on all interactive elements
Color Semantics: Colors are used semantically (blue for primary/analytics, green for success/view, red for destructive, purple for special features, etc.)
Professional Polish: Subtle shadows, rounded corners, smooth transitions, and gradient backgrounds create a refined user experience
Unique Color Rule: NO TWO BUTTONS IN THE SAME BUTTON GROUP CAN HAVE THE SAME BACKGROUND COLOR. All gray colors are prohibited for button backgrounds in admin/analytics interfaces.
Icon Consistency: Always use inline SVG icons with Heroicons pattern. Never use react-icons or other icon libraries for Medium Action Icons.
designPrinciples.layoutPhilosophy: The design system prioritizes clarity, hierarchy, and ease of use. Components are designed to be self-contained, reusable, and maintainable.

pageLayout.description: Standard page container structure for all dashboard and admin pages

container.className: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-4 sm:py-8

padding.horizontal: px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 (16px mobile, 24px tablet, 32px desktop)

container.topOffset: style={{ paddingTop: '120px' }} - Accounts for fixed header

sectionSpacing.small: mb-4 sm:mb-6 md:mb-8 (16px mobile, 24px tablet, 32px desktop)

pageHeader.description: Standard page header with title and description

title.className: text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2 text-center sm:text-left
title.alignment: text-center sm:text-left (centered on mobile, left-aligned on desktop)

formActionButtons.description: Form action buttons for Save, Reset, and Cancel actions. These buttons appear at the bottom of forms in a horizontal row with equal width distribution.

button.baseClasses: flex-1 sm:flex-1 flex-shrink-0 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-0 sm:gap-3 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105
button.width: flex-1 (equal width distribution, takes available space)
button.spacing: gap-0 sm:gap-3 (no gap on mobile, 12px gap on tablet+)

saveButton.description: Save/Submit button - Green color scheme for success/confirmation actions
saveButton.loadingState: Shows spinner icon when loading, text changes to 'Saving...'
saveButton.textVisibility: hidden sm:inline (icon only on mobile, icon + text on tablet+)

resetButton.description: Reset button - Orange color scheme for warning/reset actions
resetButton.textVisibility: hidden sm:inline (icon only on mobile, icon + text on tablet+)

cancelButton.description: Cancel button - Red color scheme for destructive/cancel actions
cancelButton.textVisibility: hidden sm:inline (icon only on mobile, icon + text on tablet+)

iconContainer.className: flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-{color}-200 flex items-center justify-center
iconContainer.background: bg-{color}-200 (darker than button background for depth)

text.visibility: hidden sm:inline (hidden on mobile, visible on tablet+)

colorSemantics.green: Save, Submit, Confirm actions - Success/positive actions
colorSemantics.orange: Reset, Refresh, Warning actions - Caution/reset actions
colorSemantics.red: Cancel, Delete, Destructive actions - Negative/cancel actions

requiredAttributes.title: Button label for tooltip (e.g., 'Save Event', 'Reset Form', 'Cancel')
requiredAttributes.aria-label: Screen reader label matching button text
requiredAttributes.type: submit for save button, button for reset/cancel

loadingState.description: For save/submit buttons, show loading spinner when processing
loadingState.spinnerIcon: Animated spinner SVG with animate-spin class
loadingState.textChange: Text changes to 'Saving...' or 'Creating...' when loading
loadingState.disabledState: Button is disabled during loading with opacity-50

checkboxes.description: Custom styled checkbox component with checkmark icon. Used in forms for boolean options and feature toggles.

structure.container: label with flex flex-col items-center layout
structure.checkboxWrapper: span with relative flex items-center justify-center
structure.tickContainer: span with custom-checkbox-tick class containing SVG checkmark
structure.label: span with text below checkbox

checkmarkIcon.visibility: Only shown when checkbox is checked

focusState.description: Blue focus ring for keyboard navigation

hoverState.border: border-blue-500 (changes border to blue on hover)

label.className: mt-2 text-xs text-center select-none break-words max-w-[6rem]
label.maxWidth: max-w-[6rem] (96px max width for label text)

container.description: Provides consistent spacing and alignment for checkbox items in grid layouts

labelWrapper.layout: Vertical flex layout with centered items
labelWrapper.description: Wraps checkbox and label for vertical alignment

spacingAndAlignment.checkboxToLabel: mt-2 (8px spacing between checkbox and label)
spacingAndAlignment.description: Balanced spacing ensures checkboxes are visually aligned and evenly distributed

requiredAttributes.name: name attribute for form submission
requiredAttributes.onClick: onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} (prevents event bubbling when needed)

accessibility.label: Always wrap checkbox in label element
accessibility.htmlFor: Use htmlFor attribute when label is separate from input
accessibility.ariaLabel: Use aria-label if no visible label
accessibility.focusState: Focus ring ensures keyboard navigation visibility
accessibility.disabledState: Proper disabled styling indicates non-interactive state

cssImplementation.description: Custom CSS classes defined in globals.css, not Tailwind utilities

usageExample.description: Checkbox with label in grid layout

referenceImplementation.description: Checkbox used in event form for boolean options like 'Active', 'Allow Guests', etc.

navigationButtonGroups.description: Grid-based navigation button groups for dashboard and admin interfaces. Each button must have a unique color within the same group.

grid.className: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4

buttonCard.structure: Link component with flex column layout
buttonCard.baseClasses: flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-lg shadow-md p-4 text-xs transition-all group
buttonCard.completeClassName: flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-{color}-50 hover:bg-{color}-100 text-{color}-800 rounded-lg shadow-md p-4 text-xs transition-all group
buttonCard.hoverEffect: group class enables child hover effects

iconContainer.className: flex-shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-{color}-100 flex items-center justify-center mb-3 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300
iconContainer.hoverEffect: group-hover:scale-110 (10% scale increase when parent is hovered)

requiredAttributes.title: Tooltip text matching button label
requiredAttributes.aria-label: Screen reader label matching button label

navigationButtonGroups.criticalRule: NO TWO BUTTONS IN THE SAME BUTTON GROUP CAN HAVE THE SAME BACKGROUND COLOR. All gray colors (gray, slate, stone, zinc, neutral) are PROHIBITED for button backgrounds.

multiStateToggleSwitch.description: Toggle switch component that cycles through multiple states (e.g., 7d, 30d, 90d, all time)

container.className: flex justify-center items-center gap-4 mt-6 mb-8

leftLabel.activeState: text-purple-600 (when toggle is NOT in first state)
leftLabel.inactiveState: text-purple-300 (when toggle IS in first state)

rightLabel.activeState: text-blue-600 (when toggle IS in active state)
rightLabel.inactiveState: text-blue-300 (when toggle is NOT in active state)
rightLabel.dynamicText: Displays current state text (e.g., '30 Days', '90 Days', 'All Time')

switch.className: relative inline-flex h-10 w-16 items-center rounded-full transition-all duration-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 hover:scale-105
switch.activeState: bg-blue-500 focus:ring-blue-500 (when in 30d, 90d, or all states)

thumb.className: inline-flex items-center justify-center h-8 w-8 transform rounded-full bg-white transition-transform duration-300 shadow-md
thumb.activePosition: translate-x-7 (28px right - when in active state)
thumb.inactivePosition: translate-x-1 (4px left - when in inactive state)

thumbIcon.activeIcon: Calendar icon (when in active state) - text-blue-600
thumbIcon.inactiveIcon: Clock icon (when in inactive state) - text-purple-600

statsCards.description: Metric display cards with icons, labels, and values. Used for displaying key statistics and KPIs.

grid.className: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-6 mb-8

cardLayout.layout: Horizontal flex with vertical center alignment

iconContainer.className: flex-shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-{color}-100 flex items-center justify-center
iconContainer.background: bg-{color}-100 (semantic color based on metric type)
iconContainer.flexProperties: flex-shrink-0 (prevents shrinking), flex items-center justify-center (centers icon)

contentArea.width: w-0 flex-1 (flexible width, takes remaining space)

tabNavigation.description: Tab navigation component for organizing content into logical sections. Includes icon containers and color-coded active/inactive states.

tabButton.baseClasses: py-3 px-4 border-b-2 font-semibold text-base flex items-center gap-3 rounded-t-lg transition-all duration-300
tabButton.layout: flex items-center gap-3 (horizontal flex with 12px gap)

iconContainer.className: flex-shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-110

sectionTitle.spacing: mb-4 or mb-6 (16px or 24px bottom margin)

gradientMetricCards.description: Gradient background cards for displaying key metrics with visual emphasis

container.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 (or grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 for 3 cards)

card.gradient: bg-gradient-to-br (diagonal gradient from top-left to bottom-right)
card.colors: from-{color}-50 to-{color}-100 (light to slightly darker shade)

contentListItems.description: List items for displaying content with metrics and action buttons

item.className: border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-4 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

metricsRow.className: flex items-center gap-4 mt-2 text-sm text-gray-600
metricsRow.layout: flex items-center (horizontal flex with vertical center)

actionButton.className: flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-blue-100 hover:bg-blue-200 flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-110

progressBars.description: Progress bars for displaying percentages and distributions (e.g., demographics, country breakdowns)

fill.width: style={{ width: `${percentage}%` }} (dynamic width based on percentage)

emptyStates.description: Empty state displays for sections with no content or placeholder content

numberFormatting.description: Utility functions for formatting numbers and currency values

currency.implementation: new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', { style: 'currency', currency: 'USD', minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }).format(amount)

fontWeights.semibold: 600 - Button text, tab labels, metric labels

sacredSpacing.usage: Consistent vertical spacing between major sections (mb-8)

responsiveSpacing.description: Spacing that adapts to screen size

semanticUsage.blue: Primary actions, analytics, views, general metrics, information
semanticUsage.green: Success states, subscribers, users, positive metrics, view actions
semanticUsage.purple: Special features, revenue, financial metrics, advanced actions
semanticUsage.violet: Export, data operations, secondary special features
semanticUsage.orange: Engagement, performance metrics, warnings, attention items
semanticUsage.red: Destructive actions, delete, errors, critical alerts

shadePattern.description: Consistent shade pattern for color families
shadePattern.600: Active text, borders, strong emphasis (text-{color}-600, border-{color}-600)

shadows.medium: shadow-md - Cards, button groups, tab content
shadows.hover: hover:shadow-md or hover:shadow-lg - Enhanced shadow on hover

radius.lg: rounded-xl (12px) - Icon containers, gradient cards, toggle switches
radius.full: rounded-full - Toggle switches, progress bars, circular elements

width.thick: border-2 (2px) - Tab borders, toggle switch borders, pagination buttons

colors.accent: border-{color}-400 or border-{color}-500 for colored borders

easing.explicit: Can specify ease-out, ease-in, etc. if needed

scale.subtle: hover:scale-105 (5% increase) - Full-width buttons, toggle switches
scale.moderate: hover:scale-110 (10% increase) - Icon buttons, button groups, table actions

accessibility.keyboardNavigation: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
accessibility.colorContrast: All text must meet WCAG AA contrast requirements
accessibility.semanticHTML: Use semantic HTML elements (button, link, nav, dl/dt/dd for stats)

responsiveDesign.mobileFirst: Design for mobile first, then enhance for larger screens
responsiveDesign.gridResponsiveness: Always provide mobile fallback with grid-cols-1
responsiveDesign.typographyScaling: Use responsive text sizes (text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-3xl)
responsiveDesign.spacingScaling: Responsive padding and margins (px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8, mb-4 sm:mb-6 md:mb-8)
responsiveDesign.alignment: text-center sm:text-left (centered on mobile, left-aligned on desktop)

statsCard.structure: Card → Content → Flex Layout → Icon Container + Content Area → Definition List
statsCard.iconSize: w-14 h-14 container, w-10 h-10 icon
statsCard.textHierarchy: dt (label) text-sm text-gray-500, dd (value) text-lg text-gray-900

gradientCard.structure: Gradient Background → Padding → Title + Value + Description

contentListItem.structure: Border Container → Flex Layout → Content Area (Title + Metrics) + Action Button

progressBar.structure: Label Row (flex justify-between) → Progress Container → Progress Fill

formActionButtons.structure: Container (flex flex-row) → Save Button (green) + Reset Button (orange) + Cancel Button (red)

checkbox.structure: Container (custom-grid-cell) → Label (flex flex-col) → Checkbox Wrapper (relative span) → Input + Tick Container → Label Text

buttonGroups.whenToUse: Navigation dashboards, admin home pages, feature selection interfaces
requirements: Each button must have unique color within same group
No gray colors allowed
Must include title and aria-label
Use inline SVG icons only
Responsive grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4

statsCards.whenToUse: Dashboard metrics, KPI displays, summary statistics
requirements: Use semantic colors (blue=views, green=users, purple=revenue, orange=engagement)
Icon container: w-14 h-14 with w-10 h-10 icon
Use definition list (dl/dt/dd) for semantic structure
Responsive grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4

tabs.whenToUse: Organizing content into logical sections, multi-view interfaces
requirements: Color-code each tab (blue, green, purple, orange, etc.)
Icon container: w-14 h-14 with w-10 h-10 icon
Active state: bg-{color}-100 text-{color}-600 border-{color}-500
Inactive state: bg-{color}-50 text-{color}-400 border-transparent
Include hover effects on inactive tabs

toggleSwitches.whenToUse: Binary state toggles, date range selection, filter controls
requirements: Size: h-10 w-16 with h-8 w-8 thumb
Labels on both sides with color transitions
Icons in thumb (calendar for active, clock for inactive)
Smooth transitions: transition-all duration-300

gradientCards.whenToUse: Highlighting key metrics, growth indicators, important statistics
requirements: Gradient: bg-gradient-to-br from-{color}-50 to-{color}-100
Border radius: rounded-xl (12px)
Padding: p-6 (24px)
Value: text-3xl font-bold text-{color}-700

contentLists.whenToUse: Displaying lists of items with metrics and actions
requirements: Border: border border-gray-200
Hover: hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
Action button: w-10 h-10 with w-6 h-6 icon
Metrics: flex items-center gap-4 with w-4 h-4 icons
Container: w-full bg-gray-200 rounded-full h-2
Fill: bg-{color}-600 h-2 rounded-full with dynamic width
Label row: flex justify-between text-sm
Smooth transitions: transition-all duration-300

formActionButtons.whenToUse: Form submission actions at the bottom of forms (Save, Reset, Cancel)
requirements: Container: flex flex-row gap-2 sm:gap-3 mt-4
All buttons: flex-1 h-14 rounded-xl with equal width
Save button: bg-green-100 hover:bg-green-200 with checkmark icon
Reset button: bg-orange-100 hover:bg-orange-200 with refresh icon
Cancel button: bg-red-100 hover:bg-red-200 with X icon
Icon container: w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-{color}-200
Icon: w-6 h-6 text-{color}-600 inline SVG
Text: font-semibold text-{color}-700 hidden sm:inline
Hover effect: hover:scale-105 transition-all duration-300
Loading state: Show spinner and disable button for save actions

checkboxes.whenToUse: Boolean form fields, feature toggles, option selections in forms
requirements: Size: h-6 w-6 (24px × 24px)
Border: border-2 border-gray-400 rounded-lg
Background: bg-white (unchecked), bg-blue-600 (checked)
Checkmark: w-6 h-6 text-black SVG with strokeWidth='4'
Label: mt-2 text-xs text-center select-none break-words max-w-[6rem]
Container: custom-grid-cell with p-2 padding
Container: label with flex flex-col items-center
Focus: ring-2 ring-blue-500 ring-offset-2
Hover: border-blue-500 (when not disabled)
Disabled: opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed
Grid layout: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-2

spacing.description: Balanced spacing ensures visual alignment and even distribution

navigationButtonGroup.description: Complete implementation of navigation button group

gradientCard.description: Complete implementation of gradient metric card
gradientCard.code:

tabNavigation.code: {tabs.map((tab) => ( ))}

progressBar.code: Label {percentage}%

contentListItem.description: Complete implementation of content list item
contentListItem.code:
{title}

formActionButtons.description: Complete implementation of form action buttons (Save, Reset, Cancel)
formActionButtons.code: {/* Save Button */} {/* Reset Button */} {/* Cancel Button */}

checkbox.description: Complete implementation of custom checkbox with label

formatCurrency.description: Format currency values with exactly 2 decimal places

formatNumber.description: Format large numbers with K/M abbreviations

getColorClasses.description: Helper function to get button color classes

doNot: Use duplicate colors within the same button group
Use gray colors (gray, slate, stone, zinc, neutral) for button backgrounds in admin/analytics interfaces
Skip accessibility attributes (title, aria-label) on interactive elements
Use react-icons or other icon libraries for Medium Action Icons - always use inline SVG
Omit hover effects on interactive elements
Use inconsistent spacing values - follow the spacing scale
Mix different button styles on the same page
Use fixed heights that cause content cropping - use h-auto with proper object-fit
Hardcode colors instead of using semantic color classes
Forget to include focus states for keyboard navigation

componentStructure: Always use semantic HTML (button, link, nav, dl/dt/dd)
Group related functionality in logical sections
Maintain color semantic consistency (blue=primary, green=success, etc.)
stateManagement: Use React useState for local component state
Provide default values for optional props
Handle loading and error states gracefully
performance: Use inline SVG icons (no external icon libraries for Medium Action Icons)
Optimize images with Next.js Image component when applicable
Use CSS transitions instead of JavaScript animations where possible
Lazy load heavy content when appropriate

components: Page header with title and description
Navigation button group (8 buttons with unique colors)
Tab content sections (Overview, Content, Audience, Revenue)

formActionButtons.description: Form action buttons at bottom of event edit form with Save (green), Reset (orange), and Cancel (red) buttons

checkboxes.description: Custom styled checkbox with checkmark icon, used for boolean form fields like 'Active', 'Allow Guests', etc. Balanced spacing and alignment for grid layouts.
